aeo_readiness.summary: Beacon Plumbing & Mechanical Inc. has some foundational elements for AEO but lacks optimization in critical areas such as content depth, user engagement, and local SEO.
quick_wins: Add customer reviews and testimonials to build trust and improve local search presence.
Optimize meta tags and headers with targeted keywords like 'Bellevue plumber' and 'emergency plumbing services'.
Create location-specific landing pages for better local search visibility.

gbp_analysis.found: The website has JSON-LD and Microdata schema markup implemented.
gbp_analysis.summary: While schema markup is present, it is not fully optimized for Google's Business Profile (GBP). The lack of reviews and incomplete service information are critical issues.
critical_issues: No Google reviews or GBP listing found.
Missing detailed service descriptions and pricing information.
Lack of structured data for specific services and locations.

nap_citations.summary: The business has a consistent NAP (Name, Address, Phone number) on its website but lacks citations on major local directories and platforms.
action_items: Create and verify a Google Business Profile listing.
List the business on local directories such as Yelp, Bing Places, and Yellow Pages.
Ensure NAP consistency across all online platforms and directories.

schema_gaps: Service schema for each specific service offered.
Review schema to showcase customer testimonials and ratings.
LocalBusiness schema with detailed address and service area information.

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of localized and service-specific content.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Users searching for detailed plumbing services or local providers in Bellevue.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Optimize existing content with location-based keywords and detailed service descriptions.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Develop a blog with expert advice on common plumbing issues and solutions to establish industry authority.

page_title: Bellevue Plumber | Bellevue Plumbing | Bellevue Plumbers | Beacon Plumbing
